form.label: Pi-hole Upstreams and Performance
form.description: Forwarding destinations, response latency, reply quality, caching, and DNSSEC.

search.query: | stats count as total count(eval(cached=true())) as cached | eval ratio=round(100*cached/total,2) | fields ratio
| where reply_time_ms>=0 | timechart span=5m avg(reply_time_ms) as average perc95(reply_time_ms) as p95
| eval disposition=case(forwarded=true(),"Forwarded",cached=true(),"Cache/local",action="blocked","Blocked",1=1,"Other") | timechart span=5m count by disposition useother=f

| where isnotnull(upstream) | stats count as queries avg(reply_time_ms) as avg_ms perc95(reply_time_ms) as p95_ms count(eval(reply_code="NXDOMAIN")) as nxdomain count(eval(dnssec="BOGUS")) as dnssec_bogus dc(query) as domains by upstream | eval avg_ms=round(avg_ms,2),p95_ms=round(p95_ms,2) | sort - queries
| stats count by dnssec | sort - count

| where reply_time_ms>=0 AND isnotnull(upstream) | stats count as queries avg(reply_time_ms) as avg_ms max(reply_time_ms) as max_ms perc95(reply_time_ms) as p95_ms by query upstream | where queries>=3 | eval avg_ms=round(avg_ms,2),max_ms=round(max_ms,2),p95_ms=round(p95_ms,2) | sort - p95_ms | head 100
